SQL:WITH DATA_INPUT AS (
	SELECT a.*,b.* ,c.*,m.* 
	FROM MPDVAN AS a
	INNER JOIN MPDCDF AS b ON a.PVCFIN = b.QJCFIN
	INNER JOIN MPDFHE AS c ON b.QJFTID = c.PEFTID
	INNER JOIN mitmas AS m ON a.PVPRNO = m.MMITNO
	WHERE a.PVFACI IN (200, 250, 260, 300)
	AND m.MMSTAT = 20)

SELECT DISTINCT OM.*,
PFOPTN OOPT 
FROM DATA_INPUT DI
LEFT OUTER JOIN MPDOPT OM ON DI.QJOPTN = OM.PFOPTN

SQL:WITH DATA_INPUT AS (
	SELECT a.* ,b.* ,c.* ,m.* 
	FROM MPDVAN AS a
	INNER JOIN MPDCDF AS b ON a.PVCFIN = b.QJCFIN
	INNER JOIN MPDFHE AS c ON b.QJFTID = c.PEFTID
	INNER JOIN  mitmas AS m ON a.PVPRNO = m.MMITNO
	WHERE a.PVFACI IN (200, 250, 260, 300)
	AND m.MMSTAT = 20)

SELECT DISTINCT FM.*
FROM DATA_INPUT DI
LEFT OUTER JOIN MPDFHE FM ON DI.QJFTID = FM.PEFTID

SQL:WITH DATA_INPUT AS (
	SELECT a.*, b.*, c.*,m.* 
FROM MPDVAN AS a
INNER JOIN MPDCDF AS b ON a.PVCFIN = b.QJCFIN
INNER JOIN MPDFHE AS c ON b.QJFTID = c.PEFTID
INNER JOIN mitmas AS m ON a.PVPRNO = m.MMITNO
WHERE a.PVFACI IN (200, 250, 260, 300)
AND m.MMSTAT = 20)

SELECT DISTINCT O.*, DI.PEFTID
FROM DATA_INPUT DI
LEFT OUTER JOIN MPDVOF O ON DI.QJFTID = O.PLFTID AND DI.QJOPTN = O.PLOPTN
SQL: SELECT * FROM V_MPDHED_WPP WHERE PHSTRT = 'REG' and PHPRNO IN (SELECT MMITNO FROM V_MITMAS_WPP_MITMPR_Joined)

SQL:  WITH RankedData AS (
    SELECT *,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
               PARTITION BY PMPRNO
               ORDER BY PMFDAT DESC, PMTDAT DESC
           ) AS rn
    FROM V_MPDMAT_WPP
    WHERE PMPRNO IN (
        SELECT MMITNO
        FROM V_MITMAS_WPP_MITMPR_Joined
    )
    AND PMMTNO IN (
        SELECT MMITNO
        FROM V_MITMAS_WPP_MITMPR_Joined
    )
)
SELECT *
FROM RankedData
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY PMPRNO;

SQL:WITH V_MITMAS_301 AS (
SELECT *
FROM MITMAS
WHERE MMSTAT NOT IN ('90', '80')
AND MMITNO IN (SELECT MBITNO FROM MITBAL WHERE MBWHLO in ('301'))
) , 
V_MITAUN_301 AS (
SELECT MUCONO, MUITNO, MUAUTP, MUALUN, MUDCCD
, MUCOFA, MUDMCF, MUPCOF, MUAUS1, MUAUS2
, MUAUS3, MUAUS4, MUAUS5, MUAUS6, MUAUS9
, MUUNMU, MUTXID, MURGDT, MURGTM, MULMDT
, MUCHNO,  MUCHID
FROM MITAUN
WHERE (MUITNO IN (SELECT MMITNO FROM V_MITMAS_301))
)

SELECT UM.*,M.MMVAMT
FROM V_MITAUN_WPP UM
LEFT OUTER JOIN V_MITMAS_301 M ON UM.MUITNO = M.MMITNO
WHERE UM.MUITNO NOT LIKE 'ZZ%'

select mas.*, mpr.MMCONO AS MP_MMCONO, mpr.MMITNO AS MP_MMITNO, mpr.MMSUNO,
mpr.MMPUPR, mpr.MMPUCD, mpr.MMCUCD, mpr.MMPPDT, mpr.MMSAPR, mpr.MMSTUN,
mpr.MMSACD, mpr.MMCUCS, mpr.MMSPDT, mpr.MMDIGI, mpr.MMBGRP, mpr.MMPRVG,
mpr.MMFRE3, mpr.MMFRE4, mpr.MMEACD, mpr.MMOTDI, mpr.MMBOGR, mpr.MMPRGR,
mpr.MMLAMA, mpr.MMACHK, mpr.MMBPEY, mpr.MMSPUN, mpr.MMSPUC, mpr.MMALUN,
mpr.MMRGDT AS MP_MMRGDT, mpr.MMRGTM AS MP_MMRGTM, mpr.MMLMDT AS MP_MMLMDT,
mpr.MMCHNO AS MP_MMCHNO, mpr.MMCHID AS MP_MMCHID 
FROM V_MITMAS_301 mas
LEFT JOIN MITMPR mpr ON mas.MMITNO = mpr.MMITNO
WHERE mas.MMITNO NOT LIKE 'ZZ%'
AND mpr.MMITNO NOT LIKE 'ZZ%'
and  MMCHCD <> 3
